introSection: Storm was a steel roller coaster located at Botton's Pleasure Beach in Skegness, Lincolnshire, England, UK. It was located on top of a building and replaced the Zyklon. It operated from 1991 to 2005. It was replaced by the Rockin Roller and what happened to it is unknown.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride was located on the roof of an arcade.

fullText:
Storm was a steel roller coaster located at Botton's Pleasure Beach in Skegness, Lincolnshire, England, UK. It was located on top of a building and replaced the Zyklon. It operated from 1991 to 2005. It was replaced by the Rockin Roller and what happened to it is unknown.

The ride was located on the roof of an arcade.

Red track and white supports.




 * https://skegness.wordpress.com/2013/05/16/the-storm-bottons-new-amusement-park-ride/
